approved_by_message: User approved all 12 automatable items on 2026-05-24T12:18:00Z

items.title: Write auth flow tests
items.description: Add tests covering login, logout, registration, and password reset auth flows.

items.title: Add webhook signature verification stubs for M-Pesa/e-Mola
items.description: Add webhook signature/HMAC verification to payment provider webhook endpoints to prevent forged callbacks.

items.title: Fix healthz E2E test uptime assertion
items.description: Fix the healthz endpoint E2E test so the uptime assertion matches the actual response shape.

items.title: Fix /api/jobs E2E test envelope shape
items.description: Fix the /api/jobs E2E test so it asserts against the correct response envelope structure.

items.title: Deprecate token-in-URL for data export
items.description: Replace token-in-URL authentication for data export endpoints with header-based auth to avoid token leakage in logs/referrers.

items.title: Fix N+1 posterName() in admin
items.description: Resolve N+1 query issue where posterName() triggers individual lookups per job in admin views. Batch-load user names via publication join or denormalization.

items.title: Add compound index for featured-exclusion query
items.description: Add a compound MongoDB index to support the featured-exclusion query pattern efficiently.

items.title: Increase IP hash truncation to >=16 chars
items.description: Increase the IP address hash truncation length to at least 16 characters to reduce collision risk.

items.title: Add payment provider registry tests
items.description: Add unit tests for the payment provider registry covering M-Pesa and e-Mola integration paths.

items.title: Add email notification tests
items.description: Add tests verifying email notification triggers and content for key application events.

items.title: Add client helper unit tests
items.description: Add unit tests for client-side helper functions.
